nasb.text: He said, “If the Lord does not help you, from where shall I help you? From the threshing floor, or from the wine press?”

esv.text: And he said, “If the Lord will not help you, how shall I help you? From the threshing floor, or from the winepress?”

cnv.text: 他說：“如果耶和華不救你，我又從哪裡救你？是從打穀場，或是從榨酒池呢？”

ccb.text: 王说：“如果耶和华不帮助你，我怎能帮助你呢？我既无粮也无酒。
